data.title: Amazon And Walmart Dominate Black Friday As Online Sales Soar 14.6%
data.description: Black Friday sales in the US saw contrasting trends between in-store and online shopping, with e-commerce dominating and AI chatbots driving website visits.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Marvell Technology Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: Marvell Technology offers a dividend amount of 6 cents per share. You can earn $500 monthly if you start with the yearly target of $6,000.

data.title: Litecoin Price Jumps 20% In 24 Hours: Why Is LTC Going Up?
data.description: Litecoin (CRYPTO: LTC) has surged 20%, following news of possibly being included in a crypto index ETF and wider market optimism around altcoins.

data.title: JPMorgan Fined ~$1.8M In Singapore Over Misconduct By Its Relationship Managers: Details
data.description: JPMorgan Chase has been fined S$2.4 million ($1.8 million) by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) for failing to prevent and detect misconduct by its relationship managers (RMs).
